title: Hats & Sundresses Day Party — R&B, Caribbean & Afrobeats (30+)
location: 3540 Club Dr, Lawrenceville, GA
description: Today: 30+ day party with R&B, Caribbean and Afrobeats DJs. Birthday-table energy, fly fits, easy Saturday date — just south of Atlanta.

title: Poetic Jazz — Prince Tribute at The Vick at Healey
location: The Vick at Healey, 57 Forsyth St NW, Atlanta, GA
description: Intimate downtown jazz tribute to Prince — vocals, bass, keys, candles. A grown-up 'dinner then music' weeknight date.

title: Afrobeats to the World — Atlanta
location: Atlanta, GA (see ATTW site for venue)
description: 18+ Afrobeats party night — DJs, dancefloor, international crowd. Late, loud, and the 'wear something cute, lose your voice' kind of Friday.

title: R&B & Rosé Brunch & Day Party at Seven Midtown
location: Seven Midtown, Atlanta, GA
description: Independence Day R&B brunch + rosé in Midtown. Easy 4th-of-July plan: daytime dancing, fireworks at Centennial Park after.

title: Rum Punch Fest — Reggae on the Rooftop (4th of July Weekend)
location: Cafe Circa Rooftop, 464 Edgewood Ave SE, Atlanta, GA
description: Rooftop reggae + Afrobeats + soca + 1-hour rum punch open bar. Skyline view, late-night energy — the loudest, easiest 4th-of-July date in town.

title: Keke Wyatt — City Winery Atlanta
location: City Winery Atlanta, 650 North Ave NE, Atlanta, GA
description: R&B powerhouse with a full live band — velvety, belt-your-heart-out Sunday. Dinner-and-a-show date on the Old Fourth Ward beltline.

title: Pizza for the Animals! (Pizza Verdura Sincera x Farm of the Free)
location: Pizza Verdura Sincera, Atlanta, GA
description: Vegetarian pizza pop-up benefiting an animal sanctuary. Low-key Tuesday date: good pizza, good cause, easy conversation.

title: Isamu Noguchi: 'I am not a designer' — Opening Week at the High
location: High Museum of Art, 1280 Peachtree St NE, Atlanta, GA
description: Midtown's biggest summer art date — Noguchi's first design retrospective in ~25 years, ~200 objects. Coffee at the café, sculpture garden, walkable to dinner.

title: Flyleaf with Lacey Sturm — 20th Anniversary Tour
location: Tabernacle, 152 Luckie St NW, Atlanta, GA
description: Reunion-era rock at the Tabernacle — sing-along setlist in a beautiful downtown room. Pre-show at MAX's or Parish, walk over.

title: Na'im Lynn — Helium Comedy Club
location: Helium Comedy Club, 3070 Windward Plaza, Alpharetta, GA
description: Sharp, storytelling stand-up from a familiar TV face. Friday-date energy: dinner in Alpharetta, then laugh until your face hurts.

title: Jill Scott — To Whom This May Concern Tour (with Moonchild)
location: Fox Theatre, 660 Peachtree St NE, Atlanta, GA
description: Neosoul residency-style show with a full live band — Jilly from Philly at the Fox. Slow-dance energy, grown-and-sexy Friday night.

title: ATL Vegan Festival — Piedmont Park
location: Piedmont Park, Atlanta, GA
description: Plant-based food festival in the park — samples, vendors, music. Picnic blanket date: graze, walk, people-watch, repeat.

title: Life Space Vegan Chef Cook-Off
location: 294 Hamilton E Holmes Dr NW, Atlanta, GA
description: Chefs battle it out plant-based style — tasting rounds, audience vote, low-key Sunday. Couples who cook together stay together.

title: Elevated Vegan Tasting: Conscious & Curious
location: Elevation Kitchen & Cocktails, Conyers, GA
description: Curated plant-based tasting menu outside the perimeter. Easy day-trip date if you want to leave the city for an afternoon.

title: Karlous Miller — Helium Comedy Club
location: Helium Comedy Club, 3070 Windward Plaza, Alpharetta, GA
description: Wildcards Atlanta's Karlous Miller — high-energy, crowd-work-heavy. Date that earns you bonus points for picking the funny show.

title: Tommy Davidson — City Winery Atlanta
location: City Winery Atlanta, 650 North Ave NE, Atlanta, GA
description: Legendary Atlanta comedian — Black Dynamite energy, decades of material. Late-night dinner-and-show date.

title: Cocktails in the Garden — Atlanta Botanical Garden
location: Atlanta Botanical Garden, 1345 Piedmont Ave NE, Atlanta, GA
description: Thursdays in the garden — cocktails, summer light, edible-plant beds. The most 'I can't believe this is in Atlanta' romantic Thursday.

title: HANGEO — Salsa & Bachata Night (Atrium Dance Studio)
location: Atrium Dance Studio, Atlanta, GA
description: Weekly social dance — beginner-friendly lesson then open floor. Bring a partner who'll let you lead (or follow).

title: PASOFINO Dance Social
location: Atlanta, GA (see golatindance.com)
description: Salsa/bachata social hosted by Jose Maldonado — late-night dancing crowd. For couples who already argue about who leads.

title: Buju Banton & Stephen Marley — Roots and Rhymes Tour
location: Lakewood Amphitheatre, Atlanta, GA
description: Reggae royalty co-headline: Buju Banton + Stephen Marley. Outdoor amphitheater, warm July night — a once-in-a-generation Atlanta date.

title: Rhythm & Roots — JazzyEats Supper Club
location: Creator's Kitchen LLC, Atlanta, GA
description: Live jazz + multi-course dinner — the easy 'I planned something' win. Saturday date with structure but no stress.

title: Ink Studded Vegan Fest
location: 1879 S Stone Mountain Lithonia Rd, Lithonia, GA
description: Back-to-school vegan festival with tattoo pop-ups. Daytime, alternative, off-the-beaten-path date in the Lithonia direction.

title: Lavelle Dontae — Helium Comedy Club
location: Helium Comedy Club, 3070 Windward Plaza, Alpharetta, GA
description: Sunday-night comedy special in Alpharetta. Easy close to the weekend: dinner + show + drive home smiling.

title: Not For Radio — In The Forest: North America Tour (Fox Theatre)
location: Fox Theatre, 660 Peachtree St NE, Atlanta, GA
description: Indie/alt show at the Fox — midweek discovery date. Walk from dinner on the BeltLine or Peachtree, then wander the Fox lobby after.

title: Experience Immersive Dining by Minalto
location: Peachtree Street NE, Atlanta, GA
description: Multi-sensory dinner experience — kitchen + visuals + storytelling. The 'splurge date' that you'll talk about for months.
